info.title: Flashquotes API
info.description: API for accessing event, form, and invoice data from Flashquotes

get.description: Paginated list of events for your company, newest first. Supports range filters on service_start_time and created_at, equality filters on location_id and booking_id, cursor pagination, and inline expansion of related objects via expand[].

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size. Default 10, maximum 100.

parameters.name: starting_after
parameters.description: Cursor — the id of the last event from the previous page.

parameters.name: service_start_time[gt]
parameters.description: Events whose service_start_time is strictly after this ISO 8601 datetime (must include timezone, e.g. 2026-06-01T00:00:00Z).

parameters.name: service_start_time[gte]
parameters.description: Events whose service_start_time is at or after this ISO 8601 datetime.

parameters.name: service_start_time[lt]
parameters.description: Events whose service_start_time is strictly before this ISO 8601 datetime.

parameters.name: service_start_time[lte]
parameters.description: Events whose service_start_time is at or before this ISO 8601 datetime.

parameters.name: created_at[gt]
parameters.description: Events created strictly after this ISO 8601 datetime.

parameters.name: created_at[gte]
parameters.description: Events created at or after this ISO 8601 datetime.

parameters.name: created_at[lt]
parameters.description: Events created strictly before this ISO 8601 datetime.

parameters.name: created_at[lte]
parameters.description: Events created at or before this ISO 8601 datetime.

parameters.name: location_id
parameters.description: Filter to events at this location.

parameters.name: booking_id
parameters.description: Filter to events on this booking.

parameters.name: expand[]
parameters.description: Inline related objects. On list endpoints each path must be prefixed with `data.` (e.g. `data.booking.lead`). Allow-listed paths: data.location, data.services, data.staff, data.addons, data.resources, data.booking, data.booking.lead, data.booking.eventType, data.booking.invoices. Max 20 paths, max depth 4.

400.description: Invalid query parameter (limit, date format, or expand path)

error.message: limit must be an integer between 1 and 100
service_start_time[gte] must be a valid ISO 8601 date

InvalidExpand.summary: Missing data. prefix on list endpoint

error.message: expand path 'booking.lead' must be prefixed with 'data.' on list endpoints
Unauthorized, invalid or missing API key

get.description: Retrieve a single event by id. By default returns the event's own scalar fields and foreign-key ids; pass expand[] to inline related objects.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The event id.

parameters.name: expand[]
parameters.description: Inline related objects. Allow-listed paths: location, services, staff, addons, resources, booking, booking.lead, booking.eventType, booking.invoices. Requesting any `booking.*` path auto-promotes `booking`. Max 20 paths, max depth 4.

error.message: Unauthorized, invalid or missing API key

post.description: Update an event with a Stripe-style partial JSON body — only the fields you include change. Unknown or immutable keys (`bookingId`, `shiftStartTime`, etc.) return 400 with the offending key as `param`. At least one editable field is required. `serviceStartTime` and `serviceEndTime` must be provided together, with `serviceEndTime` strictly after `serviceStartTime`. When any timing field changes the server recomputes the shift window and refetches travel times from Google Directions, unless both `travelToEventTime` and `travelFromEventTime` are supplied explicitly (explicit values always win; past events skip the refetch). Requires the Scale plan.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The event id.

parameters.name: expand[]
parameters.description: Inline related objects in the response. Same allow-list as GET /events/{id}.

schema.description: Partial event update. At least one field is required.

serviceStartTime.description: ISO 8601 datetime with timezone offset. Must be provided together with serviceEndTime.

serviceEndTime.description: ISO 8601 datetime with timezone offset. Must be strictly after serviceStartTime.

travelToEventTime.description: Whole minutes. Overrides the Google Directions refetch.

travelFromEventTime.description: Whole minutes. Overrides the Google Directions refetch.

DetailsOnly.summary: Change client details and guest count

TimingChange.summary: Move the event and adjust timeline

ExplicitTravel.summary: Override travel times (skip Google Directions refetch)

200.description: Event updated successfully. Response has the same shape as GET /events/{id}, including any relations requested via expand[].

400.description: Invalid request body or query parameter

MissingServiceEnd.summary: Only one side of the service-time pair

error.message: serviceStartTime and serviceEndTime must be provided together
At least one editable field must be provided
Unauthorized, invalid or missing API key

get.description: Legacy endpoint returning the original flat event shape. Maintained for backwards compatibility. New integrations should use GET /events/{id}.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the event

get.description: Legacy endpoint returning the original wrapped event list shape. Capped at a 7-day window. Maintained for backwards compatibility. New integrations should use GET /events.

parameters.name: event_starts_after
parameters.description: ISO 8601 date-time with timezone (e.g., 2024-01-01T00:00:00-05:00)

parameters.name: event_starts_before
parameters.description: ISO 8601 date-time with timezone (e.g., 2024-01-08T00:00:00-05:00)

400.description: Invalid date range (must be 7 days or less) or invalid date format

get.description: Retrieve form submission data for a specific response

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The form response identifier

get.description: Retrieve all invoices for a specific booking

parameters.name: booking_id
parameters.description: The booking identifier

hasMore.description: Whether more pages are available. If true, use the id of the last item in `data` as `starting_after` to fetch the next page.

Event.description: Default response includes only the fields below plus foreign-key ids (bookingId, locationId, eventBriefId). Related objects (location, services, staff, addons, resources, booking) appear only when requested via expand[].

example.name: Acme launch party
example.additionalLocationInfo: Load in via rear loading dock
example.specialNotes: No nuts in any service items

eventBriefUrl.description: Public URL to view the event brief, or null if no brief exists.

customData.description: Arbitrary JSON metadata attached to the event.

booking.description: Present only when expanded (auto-promoted by any `booking.*` expand).

Invoice.description: Slim invoice shape used everywhere invoices appear in the public API.

url.description: Encrypted public URL to view the invoice.

status.description: Computed invoice status (e.g. Draft, Open, Paid, Overdue, PartiallyPaid).

total.description: Total amount in the smallest currency unit (cents).

amountPaid.description: Amount paid excluding failed payments, in cents.

error.message: limit must be an integer between 1 and 100

param.description: Name of the offending parameter, when applicable.

LegacyEvent.description: Legacy event shape returned by GET /event/getEventData/{event_id}.

eventBriefUrl.description: URL to access the event brief

LegacyEventSummary.description: Legacy event summary shape returned by GET /event/get-events.

FormResponse.description: Flattened object with question titles as keys and answers as values

LegacyInvoice.description: Legacy invoice shape returned by GET /invoice/{booking_id}.

invoiceUrl.description: Encrypted URL to view the invoice

bookingPaymentStatus.description: Overall payment status across all invoices for this booking
